title: Adorable Bee White Ceramic Flower Jug with Contrasting Handle - 21.7cm x 18.2cm (1 Pc.) - Perfect for Home Decor, Unique Mother’s Day Gift
features: ADORABLE DESIGN: Add charm to your home with our beautifully crafted adorable bee white ceramic flower jug, featuring a delightful bee pattern and contrasting handle, perfect for enhancing any living space or centerpiece.
HIGH QUALITY CERAMIC MATERIAL: Our flower jug is made of durable and long-lasting white ceramic, ensuring both an elegant appearance and sturdiness for daily use and display.

IDEAL SIZE: Measuring 21.7cm x 18.2cm, this exquisite ceramic jug offers the perfect balance between functionality and style, making it versatile for holding your favorite flowers, plants, or simply showcasing it as a decorative piece.
PERFECT GIFT: Surprise your loved ones with this unique and thoughtful Mother's Day gift, or for other special occasions such as birthdays, anniversaries, or housewarmings.

ENHANCED PACKAGING: Rest assured that your adorable bee white ceramic flower jug will arrive safely and securely with our enhanced packaging, designed to protect your purchase throughout the shipping process.
description: Product Description This bee ceramic flower jug will keep your flower/plant looking fresh and up to date Safety Warning Please read all product packaging literature and product labels before use.
